---
name: New Tool Request
about: Suggest a new tool for agents
title: '[TOOL] '
labels: tool-request
assignees: ''
---

## Tool Name
What should the tool be called?

## Category
Which category? (office, communication, research, data, filesystem, business, technical, finance, hr, integrations)

## Description
What should the tool do?

## Actions
What actions should it support? (e.g., create, read, update, delete)

## Dependencies
Any external libraries or APIs needed?

## Use Case
Example scenario where this tool would be used.
